category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Togo EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入多哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入多哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Togo ARSE / CEET requirements, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC baselines, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, grid-connection and site-capacity constraints on Togo's 220/380 V 50 Hz system, OCPP interoperability for networked chargers, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines. Togo's EV market is extremely nascent; 2/3-wheel charging and low-power AC deployments are more realistic near-term scenarios than high-power public DC fast charging.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与多哥ARSE / CEET要求、IEC 61851安全和IEC 61000 EMC基线、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、多哥220/380 V 50 Hz系统下的并网及场址容量制约、联网充电桩OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。多哥电动汽车市场极为早期；两/三轮车充电和低功率交流部署比高功率公共直流快充更可能成为近期现实场景。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與多哥ARSE / CEET要求、IEC 61851安全和IEC 61000 EMC基線、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、多哥220/380 V 50 Hz系統下的併網及場址容量制約、聯網充電樁OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。多哥電動汽車市場極為早期；兩/三輪車充電和低功率交流部署比高功率公共直流快充更可能成為近期現實場景。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Togo, the practical gaps are ARSE / CEET coordination for any grid-connected installation, IEC 61851 and IEC 61000 evidence where required by conformity reviewers, project owners, utilities, or donor-funded tenders, connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 for IEC-aligned vehicles, and firmware / protocol work for OCPP-managed chargers. Togo operates on a 220/380 V 50 Hz grid, close to China's domestic voltage baseline, but site capacity, voltage stability, load-shedding risk, high temperature, humidity, dust, and limited EV service infrastructure materially constrain deployment. A blanket Togo EVSE whole-unit mandatory certification rule could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14. Exporters should treat 2/3-wheel and low-power AC charging as the more realistic near-term market and verify ARSE, CEET, customs, and project-owner requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入多哥时，实际差距包括：任何并网安装均须与ARSE / CEET协调；在合格评定审查方、项目业主、公用事业单位或捐助方招标要求时须提供IEC 61851和IEC 61000证据；面向IEC体系车辆须将接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；联网管理充电桩还需完成OCPP固件和协议适配。多哥电网为220/380 V 50 Hz，与中国国内电压基线接近，但场址容量、电压稳定性、限电风险、高温、湿度、粉尘以及有限的电动车服务基础设施都会实质制约部署。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的多哥强制认证规则。出口商应将两/三轮车和低功率交流充电视为更现实的近期市场，并在出货前核实ARSE、CEET、海关和项目业主要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入多哥時，實際差距包括：任何併網安裝均須與ARSE / CEET協調；在合格評定審查方、項目業主、公用事業單位或捐助方招標要求時須提供IEC 61851和IEC 61000證據；面向IEC體系車輛須將接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；聯網管理充電樁還需完成OCPP韌體和協議適配。多哥電網為220/380 V 50 Hz，與中國國內電壓基線接近，但場址容量、電壓穩定性、限電風險、高溫、濕度、粉塵以及有限的電動車服務基礎設施都會實質制約部署。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的多哥強制認證規則。出口商應將兩/三輪車和低功率交流充電視為更現實的近期市場，並在出貨前核實ARSE、CEET、海關和項目業主要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ARSE licensing determination, CEET grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Togo energy-sector rules, CEET connection procedures, IEC standard editions, national conformity requirements, customs requirements, and project-owner or donor/lender specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ARSE许可裁定、CEET并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行多哥能源行业规则、CEET接入程序、IEC标准版本、国家合格评定要求、海关要求以及项目业主或捐助方/贷款方规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ARSE許可裁定、CEET併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行多哥能源行業規則、CEET接入程序、IEC標準版本、國家合格評定要求、海關要求以及項目業主或捐助方/貸款方規格。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
